zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Lewis於1530年出生在英國肯特坎特布瑞時，她的父親Robert Lewes31歲，母親Margaret Jane Mynott Loveless24歲。她於1555年與William Lovelace III在英國肯特貝黑斯達結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1569年2月25日在英國英格蘭米德萊可倫敦 聖 登斯坦 在 馮 韋斯特享年39歲，埋葬在英國肯特坎特布瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Lewis于1530年出生在英国肯特坎特布瑞时，她的父亲Robert Lewes31岁，母亲Margaret Jane Mynott Loveless24岁。她于1555年与William Lovelace III在英国肯特貝黑斯達结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1569年2月25日在英国英格兰米德萊可倫敦 聖 登斯坦 在 馮 韋斯特享年39岁，埋葬在英国肯特坎特布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Lewis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Lewis, Leweis, Lowis, from ancient Germanic (originally West Frankish) Hludwig (itself from hlōd- ‘fame, famous’ + wīg- ‘battle’). This was Latinized as Ludovicus and Chlodovisus, which were gallicized as Clovis or Clouis, French Louis. The name may also appear as Lawis, Laweys, Lawes, by unrounding of the vowel of Lowis on the analogy of the variation between Low and Law as pet forms of Middle English Lourence alias Laurence. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Laws 2 and compare Lawrence .
Welsh: adopted for the Welsh personal name Llywelyn (see Llewellyn ).

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh’. This is one of the most common Old Irish personal names. It is derived from Lugh ‘brightness’, which was the name of a Celtic god.

variants.name: Laws
meanings: English: variant of Law (pet form of Lawrence ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Perhaps a shortened form of Scottish or Irish   McLeish  . Compare   McLaws  .

variants.name: Lewison
meanings: Welsh and English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name   Lewis   (in Wales this was taken as equivalent to the Welsh personal name   Llewelyn  ). In North America, this surname has reportedly absorbed in some cases the Greek patronymic   Iliopoulos  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): patronymic from the personal name Lewi, Polish-influenced form of Levy .

variants.name: McGlew
meanings: Irish: most probably from Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh’, a Gaelic personal name (referencing the god Lugh), sometimes Anglicized as Lewis . However, both Woulfe and MacLysaght consider McGlew to be a shortened form of Mac Dhuinnshléibhe (see McAleavey and Dunleavy ).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Lewis was born in 1530, in Canterbury, Kent, England, her father, Robert Lewes, was 31 and her mother, Margaret Jane Mynott Loveless, was 24. She married William Lovelace III in 1555, in Bethersden, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 25 February 1569, in London St Dunstan in the West, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39, and was buried in Canterbury, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Lewis est née en 1530, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Robert Lewes, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Jane Mynott Loveless, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé William Lovelace III en 1555, à Bethersden, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 février 1569, à London St Dunstan in the West, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1555 in Bethersden, Kent, England William Lovelace III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Februar 1569 im Alter von 39 Jahren in London St Dunstan in the West, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Canterbury, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Lewis è nata il nel 1530 nel Canterbury, Kent, England, sua padre, Robert Lewes, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Margaret Jane Mynott Loveless, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato William Lovelace III nel 1555, nel Bethersden, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 febbraio 1569, nel London St Dunstan in the West, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Canterbury, Kent, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Lewis(이)가 1530년 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Lewes(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Jane Mynott Loveless(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1555년 영국 켄트 베더즈든에서 William Lovelace III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1569년 2월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 런던 스트 던스탠 인 테 웨스트에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 캉르버이에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com William Lovelace III em 1555, em Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.London St Dunstan in the West, Middlesex: лондон ст дунстань ин т вест, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Lewis родилась в 1530 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Lewes было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Jane Mynott Loveless, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Lovelace III в 1555 г. в местности бетирсден, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 25 февраля 1569 г. в местности лондон ст дунстань ин т вест, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Lewis nació en 1530, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Lewes, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Jane Mynott Loveless, tenía 24 años. Se casó con William Lovelace III en 1555, en Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 25 de febrero de 1569, en London St Dunstan in the West, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.
